title: Inventory mini-grid operator data, enterprise surveys, agricultural value-chain studies, and productive-use evaluation data for LMIC rural areas
outcome: A dated source inventory that separates mini-grid operator customer data, enterprise surveys, agricultural value-chain studies, and productive-use evaluations into usable, limited, and rejected categories with explicit productive-use data granularity and access-vs-use distinction documentation.
inputs: Mini-grid operator survey reports for target countries
Enterprise survey data for rural electrification areas
expected_artifact: datasets.md update plus evidence.json records for each accepted source.
validation_method: Reviewer checks each listed source for URL, date, access status, license, geographic grain, and documented limitations — particularly productive-use data granularity and access-vs-use distinction.
done_condition: At least five candidate data sources are classified as usable, limited, or rejected with explicit reasons covering productive-use data granularity, value-chain specificity, and context-dependency documentation.

title: Map productive-use gaps in agricultural value chains for at least two LMIC contexts
outcome: A sub-national productive-use gap analysis for at least two LMIC contexts, documenting mini-grid customer data, agricultural value-chain electricity demand, and the gap between electricity access and verified productive use.
inputs: Mini-grid operator customer data for target contexts
Administrative boundary data for sub-national aggregation
expected_artifact: validation.md update with productive-use methodology and data-limitation documentation.
validation_method: Replicator confirms productive-use data extraction, value-chain specificity, and access-vs-use distinction for each target context.
done_condition: Productive-use gap analysis includes methodology, value-chain results, data-limitation documentation, and replication status for at least two contexts.

title: Analyze income and productivity impact of electrification in agricultural value chains with context-dependency documentation
outcome: An income-impact analysis linking electrification to agricultural productivity and rural income, with explicit context-dependency documentation, confound controls for market access and human capital, and the distinction between electricity access and verified productive use.
inputs: income and productivity survey data for electrified areas
expected_artifact: outputs.md update with impact methodology and context-dependency documentation.
validation_method: Replicator confirms impact methodology, confound controls, and access-vs-use distinction for each target context.
done_condition: Income-impact analysis includes methodology, context-dependency documentation, confound controls, and replication status.

title: Red-team productive-use overstatement and projected-income-claim risks
outcome: A failure-mode review identifying how productive-use gap maps could overstate the income-gain potential of electrification, how projected rather than observed productive-use data could mislead investment, and how context-dependency could be lost in generalization.
expected_artifact: outputs.md and SAFETY.md linked review note.
validation_method: Reviewer confirms every income-impact claim has context-dependency documentation, access-vs-use distinction, and confound controls. Second reviewer replicates the failure-mode check.
done_condition: Every productive-use and income-impact claim is either blocked, softened to context-limited language with explicit access-vs-use caveats, or gated behind domain review and replicated red-team review.

title: Check whether outputs match mini-grid operator and agricultural extension decision needs
outcome: A field-facing review of whether the productive-use gap and income-impact analysis would change any real decision for mini-grid operators, agricultural extension services, or rural development programs without creating perverse incentives.
expected_artifact: playbooks.md update with use and non-use guidance for mini-grid and agricultural extension audiences.
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies the actual decision, user, timing, and misuse risk — particularly the risk that projected income gains drive investment without observed productive-use evidence, or that context-dependent results are overgeneralized. Second reviewer replicates the non-use-case check.
done_condition: The output has a named user (e.g., Kenya Rural Electrification Authority productive-use officer), named decision (e.g., mini-grid site selection for agricultural value chains), explicit non-use cases (e.g., not for income-gain projections without observed productive-use data), and replicated field-reality review.
